name: The Peptide Watch, UK research-peptide vendor audit
license: CC BY 4.0, free to cite with attribution to The Peptide Watch
headline_finding: Just 9% of active UK research-peptide sellers (28 of 322 audited) publish their own verifiable independent lab certificate of analysis; the other 91% (294 sellers) show none, borrowed, self-made, or unverifiable COAs.

vendors.verdict: Hides behind an unnamed 'accredited UK lab'

BBC and Guardian reporting link the Alluvi brand to the MHRA's largest-ever seizure of unlicensed weight-loss medicines (Northampton, May 2026); the buyalluvi.co.uk storefront is now dead and the certificate cannot be tied to a reachable seller
